donationAccount.description: The Adyen account name of your charity. We will provide you with this account name once your chosen charity has been [onboarded](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/donations#onboarding).

merchantAccount.description: The merchant account identifier, with which you want to process the transaction.

payment.description: Action to be taken for completing the payment.

reference.description: The reference to uniquely identify a payment. This reference is used in all communication with you about the payment status. We recommend using a unique value per payment; however, it is not a requirement. If you need to provide multiple references for a transaction, separate them with hyphens ("-"). Maximum length: 80 characters.

status.description:
The status of the donation transaction.

Possible values:
* **completed**
* **pending**
* **refused**
